backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the backend for a math tutoring app, including user approval, session management, and materials management with admin access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin login credential update feature to its relevant frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each page/component's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting the root div for the Vite/React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router, React Query, and a top-level ErrorBoundary with 404 and error fallback UIs.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple animated spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) for use as a loading indicator.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Notification bell popover component that filters and displays per-student notifications with unread count badge and mark-as-read functionality.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: Modal component that displays a formatted payment receipt with amount, status, student details, and UPI transaction info.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A reusable stat card component that displays a title, value, icon, and optional subtitle with four color theme variants (blue, gold, green, purple).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A badge component that renders a colored pill label for one of seven predefined status values (pending, approved, rejected, etc.).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button that opens a WhatsApp chat with a preconfigured phone number and customizable message, styled with WhatsApp green.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available and initializing access control with an admin token, then invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching a student's attendance records and summary, and a mutation hook for marking attendance via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching a student's learning materials and mutation hooks for adding and deleting materials via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching a student's sessions and mutation hooks for adding and deleting sessions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes using a deep blue and gold palette.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel shell layout with a responsive sidebar navigation (including a pending payments badge), logout functionality, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Top-level layout component that initializes the app store on mount and renders child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Defines the student-facing layout with a responsive sidebar navigation (dashboard, classes, materials, courses, payments, profile), a top bar with a notification bell, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Thin backward-compatible wrapper re-exporting auth helpers from store.ts, plus utility functions to retrieve the current student ID and check if the logged-in user is an admin or student via localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Defines all core TypeScript interfaces (Student, Course, Session, Material, Payment, Notification, etc.) and provides localStorage-based CRUD helpers for the application's data store, including default seed data.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports utility functions for class name merging (cn), and formatting currency (INR), dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for marking and viewing student attendance, listing approved students from the backend and their sessions. Backend attendance calls are partially disabled due to Principal resolution limitations, with a fallback to local store data.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing course offerings with create, edit, delete, and toggle-active functionality. Uses localStorage-backed store utilities and displays courses in a card grid with a modal form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying summary statistics (total/active/pending students, sessions, materials, payments) sourced from the ICP backend and localStorage. Also shows recent students and sessions in quick-view lists.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for assigning study materials (PDF, video, etc.) to individual approved students via URL links. Materials are stored in and retrieved from the localStorage-backed store, with per-student filtering and delete support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and deleting tutoring sessions for approved students, storing session data in localStorage via the app's store utilities.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Admin page for uploading and managing study materials (links) assigned to specific approved students, persisting data in localStorage and fetching approved students from both the ICP backend and localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending notifications (broadcast or targeted) to students, with options for type and recipient, stored via the app's localStorage store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for reviewing, approving, and rejecting student payments, displaying revenue stats and a filterable payment list with receipt viewing support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for scheduling tutoring sessions for approved students by fetching students from the ICP backend and localStorage, saving session records locally with CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page that fetches all student payment records from the backend canister and merges them with localStorage data, allowing admins to approve or reject student enrollments and generate unique access codes.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page displaying the tutor's branding, stats, feature highlights, course listings from the store, testimonials, and WhatsApp contact links with navigation to login and register.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both student (email + unique code) and admin (email + password) authentication, attempting the ICP backend actor first and falling back to localStorage credentials before redirecting to the appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple static page shown after a failed payment, with links to retry via the payments page or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that reads a payment_id from the URL, marks the corresponding payment as approved in localStorage, pushes a success notification, and displays confirmation links to the dashboard and payments page.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Multi-step registration form for students to select a course, session type, and hours, then submit a UPI payment transaction ID. Saves registration data to both the ICP backend actor and localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Multi-step student booking page that lets students select a course, configure session type and hours, and submit a UPI payment transaction ID to create a session and pending payment record.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Student-facing page displaying courses the student is enrolled in, showing pricing for group and one-on-one sessions along with material counts, with a WhatsApp CTA if no courses are enrolled.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing summary stats (total classes, upcoming sessions, materials, completed sessions) and lists of upcoming sessions and recently added materials pulled from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Student materials page that loads materials assigned to the logged-in student from the store, groups them by course, and renders download/view links with file type icons.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Alternative student materials view that reads materials from localStorage by matching student email or ID, displaying them sorted by date with a link to view each file.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Displays a student's upcoming and past sessions by reading from localStorage, showing attendance status (present/absent/not marked) and Google Meet links for each session.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Shows a student's payment history with summary stats (total spent, approved, pending counts) and a list of individual payment records with status badges and a receipt modal.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Renders the logged-in student's profile including contact info, account status, a copyable access code, and enrolled courses.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Fetches and displays a student's upcoming and past sessions from the store, with join buttons for upcoming sessions and meet-link access for past ones.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public, admin (role-guarded), and student routes, and exports the configured router instance.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palette (including navy/gold brand colors using oklch variables), typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and custom keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for MathTutor admin portal, tracking existing features and a pending backend fix request (AR-1) to align hardcoded admin credentials to admin@mathtutor.com / Admin@123.
